message:
test: strengthen network fault simulation assertions and misc test updates

Network fault simulation (tests/network_fault_simulation.rs):
  The cancel_dropped_by_partition and crash_restart_lifecycle tests
  previously used loose assertions ("cancel may or may not have arrived
  depending on timing"). These are now deterministic:

  cancel_dropped_by_partition:
  - Partition is now injected at the current simulation time (10ms)
    with one tick advance before sending cancel, guaranteeing the
    cancel is sent into an already-partitioned network
  - Assertions verify: cancel NOT received, task NOT cancelled, task
    NOT completed, exactly 1 task still running, packets_dropped > 0
  - Six helper functions extracted (has_spawn_received, has_cancel_received,
    has_task_completed, has_task_cancelled, has_crashed, has_restarted)
    to replace repeated inline event scanning

  crash_restart_lifecycle:
  - Fault script now declared upfront with both crash (15ms) and restart
    (80ms) events, instead of being set incrementally mid-test
  - Assertions strengthened: crash clears running tasks (count == 0),
    spawn sent during crash stays dropped after restart, spawn after
    restart is received AND completes

Stub resolution audit (tests/stub_resolution_audit.rs):
  Extended probes with additional assertions for documentation cross-
  references and relocated artifact verification.

Rate limit test: trailing newline added.

WASM ABI matrix: owner_track reference updated to match Cargo.toml.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
